name: billing-tabs
title: Fuse BillingTabs
description: Fuse-canon Settings → Billing surface composing BA-Stripe + BillUI primitives. Renders 3 surface areas: Plans tab (flat plan grid with current-plan highlight + Upgrade/Manage billing CTAs wired to authClient.subscription.{upgrade, billingPortal} per BA-Stripe canonical) / Usage tab (mounts @fuse/usage-card) / Dunning banner (rendered above Tabs when subscription.status ∈ {past_due, unpaid}). Org-as-billing-entity discipline: every BA-Stripe call passes referenceId: orgId + customerType: "organization" per fuse-web CLAUDE.md "Pattern: BA-Stripe + BillingSDK". UC-B canonical Edit button: variant="outline" size="sm" per fuse-web founder lock 2026-05-15 Option β. Member-role gate: defense-in-depth UX (BA's org plugin enforces server-side regardless). Embedded Checkout opt-in via useEmbeddedCheckout boolean prop — resolved server-side from FUSE_USE_EMBEDDED_CHECKOUT env var to avoid client-bundle env-stripping footgun (CLAUDE.md known-quirk 1.13.10). Source: fuse-web components/billing/billing-tabs.tsx + V-close 2.0.4 PR #627/#630 + ec-05 bundle.
